title: PacksMC
description: Add packs from packsmc.com directly to your Minecraft resource pack folder.
body:
Add packs from packsmc.com directly into your Minecraft resource pack folder with ease. 

This mod streamlines the process of downloading and installing resource packs, allowing you to quickly access and organize your favorite packs without manual file management.
